channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Bob Uecker, legendary baseball broadcaster, dead at 90
item.description: Bob Uecker, a legendary baseball broadcaster who called games for the Milwaukee Brewers and played in the league, has died, the team announced. He was 90.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Shotaro Morii, 18-year-old 2-way player, bypasses Japanese baseball to sign with Athletics
item.description: Hoping to become a two-way player in Major League Baseball just like Shohei Ohtani, 18-year-old Shotaro Morii made the rare decision to bypass Japanese professional baseball entirely and agreed Wednesday to a minor league contract with the Athletics that includes a signing bonus of $1,510,500.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: San Diego Wave FC trades Jaedyn Shaw to the North Carolina Courage
item.description: Midfielder Jaedyn Shaw has been traded by the San Diego Wave FC to the North Carolina Courage, the football club announced Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5

item.title: Connor Ingram returns for Utah Hockey Club
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Hockey Club began a seven-game homestand last week by winning just one of three games. But they still have four games left at the Delta Center beginning Tuesday night against Montreal.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: UFC champion booted from Frontier flight after being told he couldn't sit in exit row
item.description: Khabib Nurmagomedov suggested that there may have been “racial” or “national” motivations for booting him from the plane — allegations which Frontier has denied.
item.dc:creator: Michael Bartiromo, NewsNation

item.title: Patriots introduce Mike Vrabel as new head coach
item.description: The New England Patriots are set to formally introduce Mike Vrabel as the team's 16th head coach in franchise history.
item.dc:creator: Melanie DaSilva, NewsNation

item.title: Vince McMahon reaches deal with SEC over hush money agreements
item.description: McMahon, according to the SEC, failed to inform WWE's board of directors and legal and financial departments of the settlement agreements.
item.dc:creator: Patrick Djordjevic, NewsNation

item.title: Jazz go cold in 97-92 loss to the Heat
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) - The Utah Jazz just can't seem to find a way to be able to close out games at home this season. Tyler Herro scored 23 points and Jaime Jaquez had 20, including five in the final 1:03, to lead the Miami Heat to a 97-92 victory over the Utah Jazz on Thursday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Former finalist Josiah Cox relishing opportunity to return with SDSU football
item.description: Cox had 35 tackles and two interceptions for the Aggies in his year in Las Cruces, including an impressive performance against ranked Texas A&M. Those skills were apparent to SDSU head coach Sean Lewis and a retooled defensive coaching staff.
item.dc:creator: Brandon Stone, Fox 5
